Low Color Contrast Test Page

This page contains more than 3 text elements with insufficient color contrast. The agent samples up to 20 visible elements and flags the finding when more than 3 fail.

This paragraph uses #aaaaaa text on a white background — contrast ratio ≈ 2.32:1.

This paragraph uses #bbbbbb text on a white background — contrast ratio ≈ 1.78:1.

This paragraph uses #cccccc text on a white background — contrast ratio ≈ 1.60:1.

This paragraph uses #999999 text on a white background — contrast ratio ≈ 2.85:1.

This paragraph uses #b0b0b0 text on a white background — contrast ratio ≈ 1.94:1.

Inline span with #aaa text.
